name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
🏠🏠 SAINT LAURENT Saint Laurent 2019 latest model, imported South African leather paired with imported YKK hardware!!️ Every stitch is very precise and thorough, every inch is perfect. Don't worry about comparing prices, just worry about not knowing quality! The best original market goods!!️ Focusing on high-end ❗ Code 26602 comes with a shoulder strap.. Dimensions: 25/17/8cm
